name: bindfetto-decode
description: Resolve bindfetto Binder transaction codes to AIDL method names.

bindfetto.catalogPath.description: Path to an AIDL catalog JSON file, or a folder — in which case every *.json under it (recursively) is merged into one catalog. Used to resolve transaction codes to method names.

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --release --manifest-path wasm/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && mkdir -p media && cp wasm/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/bindfetto_decode_wasm.wasm media/
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run build:wasm && npm run compile
